title: Kevin Spencer Cerebral Palsy Wheelchair Fan Art
about:
Kevin Spencer Cerebral Palsy Wheelchair Fan Art, also known as Disabled Kevin Spencer, refers to a series of fan art drawings of animated sitcom character Kevin Spencer from the show of the same name as a disabled person with cerebral palsy, pictured in an electric wheelchair, similar to the one used by late theoretical physicist Stephen Hawking. The art was largely made by Twitter / X user @kevinspevin in 2025. Internet users discovered the artwork in late September 2025, causing the artist to delete all of the original posts. The Disabled Kevin Spencer art then spread across social media sites like TikTok in the following weeks. Redraws of one artwork, known as Oh Kevin, Do You Need Your Headsets? were notably shared to mock internet figures, celebrities and athletes.

Some internet users claimed that the artist behind the Disabled Kevin Spencer art was named Lottie, who is purportedly the niece of rapper Kid Cudi and is infamous for controversial subject matter from her time sharing art and animations on TikTok. The claim spread in viral posts about Disabled Kevin Spencer and fueled speculation that the fan art was created as a part of an internet paraphilia.
origin:
On September 29th, 2025, X[2] user @macdenniscanon quote-tweeted a post from an X[1] user @kevinspevin, which has since been deleted as of writing.

@macdenniscanon captioned the since-deleted post, "I physically cannot wrap my mind around why someone would draw mentally and physically disabled Kevin Spencer," gaining over 4,400 likes in a month.

It's currently unknown which piece of fan art @macdenniscanon quote-tweeted in the post. However, X[3] user @imthechadtype also quote-tweeted the post on September 30th, writing, "This dude deactivated but I downloaded all the disabled Kevin Spencer art he drew," attaching four since-deleted images from @kevinspevin.

On October 4th, 2025, a screenshot of the @kevinspevin X[1] account was added to archive.is,[4] showing that they had amassed over 3,500 followers since joining in September 2025.

The archived screenshot showed artwork that @kevinspevin shared on October 3rd,[4] which showed Kevin Spencer in a wheelchair being asked, "Oh Kevin, do you need your headsets?" and being told, "Calm down Kevin… It's going to be okay." The original post has since been deleted.

On September 30th, 2025, TikToker[5] @hisslut__ shared a video in which they alleged that the artist behind the Disabled Kevin Spencer art was named Lottie, who notably went viral on TikTok[6] in December 2024 for controversial Lolicon art mostly featuring Jacknife from the Adult Swim show Superjail![7]

@hisslut__'s video spreading the claim received over 13,100 likes in a month and included a screen-recording of the orignal tweets shared by @kevinspevin.

It's been claimed by several users on TikTok[8] and X[9] that Lottie is the niece of rapper Kid Cudi.

TikToker[10] @tincant1tty also shared a recording of the @kevinspevin X account on September 29th, 2025, and also stated that the user was Lottie. The video's text overlay caption read, "Why does she always become a weirdo in every fandom she joins?" It received over 21,500 likes in a month.
